name: Delicatessen Rye Bread (Kh)
recipeIngredient: 2 To 2 3/4 Cups All-purpose flour or Unbleached flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 3/4 Cups All-purpose flour, salt, yeast, and caraway seeds in a large mixing bowl.
2. Heat milk, water, molasses, and oil in a saucepan over low heat until very warm (120 to 130F).
3. Gradually add the liquid mixture to the flour mixture, beating on high speed of an electric mixer. Scrape the bowl occasionally.
4. Add 1 cup rye flour, or enough to make a thick batter. Beat at high speed for 2 minutes.
5. Stir in the remaining rye flour and enough all-purpose flour to make a soft dough.
6. Turn the dough onto a floured surface; knead until smooth and elastic (about 5 minutes).
7. Cover with a bowl or pan and let rest for 20 minutes.
8. Divide the dough into two. Shape into round loaves and place on greased baking sheets.
9. Cover; let rise until doubled in bulk (30 to 45 minutes).
10. Bake at 375F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until done.
